title: Power Electronics Components
entry_mechanism: PSAP Track 2 — Automotive power electronics manufacturer JV leveraging Saudi SiC programme (SC-4)
executive_summary:
Automotive power electronics — on-board chargers (OBC), DC-DC converters, inverters, and motor controllers for electric vehicles — are the highest-value electronic systems in an EV drivetrain. They convert electrical energy between battery pack, motor, and grid with efficiency that directly determines range. Node AU-13 directly cascades from Saudi Arabia's semiconductor programme: SC-4 (SiC devices) → AU-13 (SiC-based automotive power electronics) → EV drivetrain. This is the most direct demonstration of how Saudi Arabia's upstream semiconductor investment creates downstream automotive manufacturing capability.

Phase II-IV timeline reflects the technology maturity dependency: SC-4 SiC device pilot must be operational before Saudi SiC-based power electronics can be manufactured domestically. Phase II begins with imported SiC devices assembled into Saudi-manufactured power electronics modules; Phase IV integrates Saudi SiC devices from SC-4 into Saudi power electronics manufacturing.

The global automotive power electronics market was valued at $12.8 billion in 2024 growing at 24.8% CAGR. Saudi Arabia's Phase II-IV opportunity — automotive power electronics for Saudi-assembled EVs and GCC export — represents a $200–400 million annual production opportunity at steady state.

companies.name: BorgWarner Power Drive Systems

companies.name: Vitesco Technologies (Continental)

companies.name: STMicroelectronics (SiC to Power Electronics)
companies.rationale: ST connects SC-4 SiC research with AU-13 power module packaging directly.

companies.name: Infineon Technologies

companies.name: Nidec (Emerson EV Systems)
companies.rationale: Nidec produces integrated EV motor and inverter systems and has international manufacturing partnerships.

partners.name: SSIH / SC-4 SiC Programme
partners.upgrade: Saudi SiC devices from SC-4 qualified for AU-13 automotive power modules; closed Saudi SiC → power electronics loop; SSIH as upstream supplier to Saudi power electronics manufacturer
partners.timeline: Phase IV: 60+ months for Saudi SiC integration

partners.name: Saudi Hot-Climate Validation (AU-5)
partners.upgrade: EV power electronics thermal validation at 55°C ambient; Saudi power electronics hot-climate qualification; reference data for global EV OEMs
